pageProps.content:
["$r",null,null,{"children":[["$r","h2",null,{"id":"收录范围","children":"收录范围"}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":"该文件夹只提供 CentOS Stream 9，非 Stream 版的 CentOS 已经停止支持。"}],"
",["$r","h2",null,{"id":"使用方法","children":"使用方法"}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":["CentOS Stream 9 默认启用了包管理工具 dnf，其是 yum 包管理工具的替代品。dnf 与 yum 大部分的命令都是通用的，dnf 也使用 ",["$r","code",null,{"children":"/etc/yum.repos.d/"}]," 进行镜像配置。"]}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":["CentOS Stream 9 中源被整合入两个文件 ",["$r","code",null,{"children":"centos.repo"}]," 和 ",["$r","code",null,{"children":"centos-addons.repo"}],"，由于文件中不包含 ",["$r","code",null,{"children":"baseurl"}]," 字段，需要手动插入，通过文本替换修改源的方法较为复杂，也可以选择直接复制最后的替换结果覆盖源文件。"]}],"
",["$r","h3",null,{"id":"文本替换","children":"文本替换"}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":["将这段代码保存为一个文件，例如 ",["$r","code",null,{"children":"update_mirror.pl"}],"。"]}],"
",["$r","CodeBlock",null,{"menus":[],"templateId":"template-0","codeLanguage":"perl","filepath":"./update_mirror.pl","enableQuickSetup":true}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":"然后，在命令行中使用以下命令来执行它："}],"
",["$r","CodeBlock",null,{"menus":[],"templateId":"template-1","codeLanguage":"bash"}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":["注意将 ",["$r","code",null,{"children":"./update_mirror.pl"}]," 替换为脚本实际保存的路径。其中的 ",["$r","code",null,{"children":"*"}]," 通配符，如果只需要替换一些文件中的源，请自行增删。"]}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":["另外，请确保已经安装了 Perl 解释器，并将 ",["$r","code",null,{"children":"perl"}]," 命令添加到系统的 ",["$r","code",null,{"children":"PATH"}]," 环境变量中。这样才能在命令行中运行 Perl 脚本。"]}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":"对于大部分 CentOS Stream 9 镜像，应该已经包含了 Perl 解释器，如果你的镜像没有包含，你可以使用以下命令简单的安装："}],"
",["$r","CodeBlock",null,{"menus":[],"templateId":"template-2","codeLanguage":"bash"}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":"最后，更新软件包缓存"}],"
",["$r","CodeBlock",null,{"menus":[],"templateId":"template-3","codeLanguage":"bash"}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":["注意，如果需要启用其中一些 repo，需要将其中的 ",["$r","code",null,{"children":"enabled=0"}]," 改为 ",["$r","code",null,{"children":"enabled=1"}],"。"]}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":["$r","strong",null,{"children":"注：截至 2023-05-16，并未在官方源与镜像源中发现 nfv-source，建议不要开启 nfv-source。"}]}],"
",["$r","h3",null,{"id":"修改结果","children":"修改结果"}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":"你可以对照替换结果是否准确，或直接复制结果覆盖源文件。"}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":[["$r","code",null,{"children":"centos.repo"}],":"]}],"
",["$r","CodeBlock",null,{"menus":[],"templateId":"template-4","codeLanguage":"ini","filepath":"/etc/yum.repos.d/centos.repo","enableQuickSetup":true}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":[["$r","code",null,{"children":"centos-addons.repo"}],":"]}],"
",["$r","CodeBlock",null,{"menus":[],"templateId":"template-5","codeLanguage":"ini","filepath":"/etc/yum.repos.d/centos-addons.repo","enableQuickSetup":true}]]}]

compiledTemplates.template-0:
{code: function (c,p,i) { var t=this;t.b(i=i||"");t.b("#!/usr/bin/perl");t.b("
");t.b("
" + i);t.b("use strict;");t.b("
" + i);t.b("use warnings;");t.b("
" + i);t.b("use autodie;");t.b("
");t.b("
" + i);t.b("my $mirrors = '");t.b(t.v(t.f("endpoint",c,p,0)));t.b("';");t.b("
");t.b("
" + i);t.b("if (@ARGV < 1) {");t.b("
" + i);t.b("    die "Usage: $0 <filename1> <filename2> ...\n";");t.b("
" + i);t.b("}");t.b("
");t.b("
" + i);t.b("while (my $filename = shift @ARGV) {");t.b("
" + i);t.b("    my $backup_filename = $filename . '.bak';");t.b("
" + i);t.b("    rename $filename, $backup_filename;");t.b("
");t.b("
" + i);t.b("    open my $input, "<", $backup_filename;");t.b("
" + i);t.b("    open my $output, ">", $filename;");t.b("
");t.b("
" + i);t.b("    while (<$input>) {");t.b("
" + i);t.b("        s/^metalink/# metalink/;");t.b("
");t.b("
" + i);t.b("        if (m/^name/) {");t.b("
" + i);t.b("            my (undef, $repo, $arch) = split /-/;");t.b("
" + i);t.b("            $repo =~ s/^\s+|\s+$//g;");t.b("
" + i);t.b("            ($arch = defined $arch ? lc($arch) : '') =~ s/^\s+|\s+$//g;");t.b("
");t.b("
" + i);t.b("            if ($repo =~ /^Extras/) {");t.b("
" + i);t.b("                $_ .= "baseurl=${mirrors}/SIGs/\$releasever-stream/extras" . ($arch eq 'source' ? "/${arch}/" : "/\$basearch/") . "extras-common\n";");t.b("
" + i);t.b("            } else {");t.b("
" + i);t.b("                $_ .= "baseurl=${mirrors}/\$releasever-stream/$repo" . ($arch eq 'source' ? "/" : "/\$basearch/") . ($arch ne '' ? "${arch}/tree/" : "os") . "\n";");t.b("
" + i);t.b("            }");t.b("
" + i);t.b("        }");t.b("
");t.b("
" + i);t.b("        print $output $_;");t.b("
" + i);t.b("    }");t.b("
" + i);t.b("}");return t.fl(); },partials: {}, subs: {  }}
compiledTemplates.template-2:
{code: function (c,p,i) { var t=this;t.b(i=i||"");t.b("# 使用 dnf");t.b("
" + i);t.b(t.v(t.f("sudo",c,p,0)));t.b("dnf install perl");t.b("
");t.b("
" + i);t.b("# 使用 yum");t.b("
" + i);t.b(t.v(t.f("sudo",c,p,0)));t.b("yum install perl");return t.fl(); },partials: {}, subs: {  }}

{code: function (c,p,i) { var t=this;t.b(i=i||"");t.b("# 使用 dnf");t.b("

" + i);t.b("# 使用 yum");t.b("
" + i);t.b(t.v(t.f("sudo",c,p,0)));t.b("yum clean all && ");t.b(t.v(t.f("sudo",c,p,0)));t.b("yum makecache");return t.fl(); },partials: {}, subs: {  }}
